message:
chore: bump Cargo.lock for ftui-layout serde_json dep

Local Cargo.lock refresh: ftui-layout (the path/git-dep frankentui workspace) gained a `serde_json` dependency upstream. Cargo's lock-resolver picked it up the next time we built, so the lock file now lists serde_json under ftui-layout's dependency block. No source change in this repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
